notes: Stat_name kept as numeric to match raw breakdown VARIANT (espn-api wrapper doesn't translate this ID). Believed to be an internal batter game-played flag; always 1.0 when a batter appears. Functionally duplicates G (stat ID 81). Not scored.
Stat_name kept as numeric to match raw breakdown. Rarely observed (1 row across 2025-2026). Likely deprecated or reserved.
Shares abbreviation HBP with batter stat (ID 12). Renamed to HBP_P to disambiguate.

Stat_name kept as numeric to match raw breakdown. Always 1.0 for relief pitchers only (never starters). Complement of GS. is_counting=false because it's redundant with GS for our purposes and never appears as a wide-pivot column downstream.

Stat_name kept as numeric to match raw breakdown VARIANT (espn-api wrapper does not translate). Confirmed via website QA: each shutout scores 5 points in this league. Identified in Phase 3.2 after observing a 5-point Hosstros delta that exactly matched 1 shutout × 5 pts.
Previously misidentified as Pitches Per Game. Confirmed via scoring settings: 250-point bonus.
Stat_name kept as numeric to match raw breakdown. Always 1.0 for any pitcher who appeared (starters and relievers). Parallel to id 22 for batters. is_counting=false; not used downstream.
Stat_name kept as numeric to match raw breakdown. Always 1.0 for starters only in limited data. Suspected duplicate of GS. Not scored.
Stat_name kept as numeric to match raw breakdown. Never observed in data across 2025-2026. Likely deprecated or reserved.
Boolean flag for designated starter. Distinct from GS which tracks actual starts.
